commands.review_summary:
The PR updates `RunWatcher.watchEventRuns` to treat `Queued` runs as active and adds a regression test for a queued run becoming completed.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main accepts `Queued` in `RunStatusSchema` but `watchEventRuns` only counts `Running` as active, so an all-Queued response stops the watcher immediately.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed for real behavior proof; there is no narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to queue from this review.

target.title: fix(watch): treat Queued runs as active so watch doesn't exit early
target.body:
### Bug

`watchEventRuns` decides whether to keep polling by counting "active" runs, but only counts `"Running"`:

```ts
const activeRuns = runs.filter((run) => run.status === "Running");
if (activeRuns.length === 0 && runs.length > 0) {
  this.stopWatching();
  displayInfo("All runs completed");
```

`RunStatusSchema` (`src/api/types.ts`) defines `["Running", "Queued", "Completed", "Failed", "Cancelled"]`. `"Queued"` means the run has been accepted but hasn't started yet. So when you `watch` an event whose function is still queued (waiting for a worker), every run has status `"Queued"`, the active count is 0, and the watcher immediately prints "All runs completed" and exits — before anything has run.

### Fix

Treat `"Queued"` as active alongside `"Running"` (both are non-terminal). The watcher then keeps polling until the runs reach a terminal state.

### Proof / tests

Added a test to `src/__tests__/watcher.test.ts` driving the real `RunWatcher` (only the API client is stubbed): first poll returns a `Queued` run, second returns `Completed`.

```
-- before the fix --
× keeps watching when all event runs are still Queued (not yet started)
  AssertionError: expected "vi.fn()" to be called 2 times, but got 1 times
  (the watcher stopped on the first poll while the run was still Queued)

-- after the fix --
✓ keeps watching when all event runs are still Queued (not yet started)
```

Full suite: 104 passed. `pnpm run check` (oxfmt + oxlint --deny-warnings + tsgo + build + tests) clean.

Found and fixed with the help of the Claude CLI.
target.author: devyrpauli
